title: Jira Board Integration
description: Connect CEO's Jira project board to GoatOS so tasks can be delegated to agents automatically.

title: Multi-Agent Hierarchy
description: Build out 2-3 direct-report agents under Goat, each with their own sub-agents. Project-based pods.

title: Daily Brief Cron Job
description: Automated morning brief generation with priorities, follow-ups, and completed tasks.

title: Cron Health Visualisation
description: Real-time per-job status tracking in Ops dashboard and Cron Health tab — last run status, error detection, success/failure counts across all modules.
